scripts.harness:check: bun run harness:lint && bun run harness:workspace-policy && bun run harness:style && bun run harness:governance && bun run harness:new-code && bun run harness:docs && bun run harness:quality:gate
scripts.harness:verify:fast: bun run harness:check && bun run test:scripts && bun run typecheck
scripts.harness:verify: bun run harness:verify:fast && bun run test && bun run build:web:budget && bun run build:hub
scripts.build: bun run harness:check && bun run build:web && bun run build:hub && bun run build:pairing
scripts.build:single-exe: bun run harness:check && bun run build:web && (cd hub && bun run generate:embedded-web-assets) && (cd cli && bun run build:exe:allinone)
scripts.build:single-exe:all: bun run harness:check && bun run build:web && (cd hub && bun run generate:embedded-web-assets) && (cd cli && bun run build:exe:allinone:all)
scripts.build:hub: cd hub && bun run generate:embedded-web-assets && bun run build
scripts.build:desktop: bun run harness:check && bun run build:single-exe && cd desktop && bun run prepare:sidecar && bun run tauri:build
scripts.typecheck: bun run typecheck:cli && bun run typecheck:web && bun run typecheck:hub && bun run typecheck:desktop && bun run typecheck:pairing && bun run typecheck:shared
scripts.test: bun run harness:check && bun run test:scripts && bun run test:cli && bun run test:hub && bun run test:web && bun run test:pairing && bun run test:shared
scripts.test:scripts: bun test scripts/devRemoteHelpers.test.ts scripts/devRemoteSupervisor.test.ts scripts/harness/support.test.ts scripts/harness/browserSmokeRuntime.test.ts scripts/harness/appLikeRouteEvidenceSupport.test.ts scripts/harness/docGardening.test.ts scripts/harness/generatedArtifactPaths.test.ts scripts/harness/governanceReport.test.ts scripts/harness/newCodeGate.test.ts scripts/harness/qualityAudit.test.ts scripts/harness/qualityGate.test.ts scripts/harness/qualityScope.test.ts scripts/harness/styleCheck.test.ts scripts/harness/upstreamSupport.test.ts scripts/harness/workspacePolicy.test.ts
